name: Hearth Tonic
description: A warm, soulbound potion with one gentle charge.

name: Dewbright Button
description: A tiny pearled button that hums with first-step magic.

name: Wolfprint Charm
description: A cool iron charm marked with a careful pawprint.

name: Moonwool Thread
description: A silvery strand that remembers stories told after rain.

name: Story Button
description: A warm wooden button with a tiny tale tucked under its rim.

name: Hearthstone Tag
description: A smooth tag cut from warm stone and quiet promises.

name: Watch Bell
description: A mute little bell that rings only for those keeping watch.
